'''Fneebs''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="Hunter" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="time">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]" within [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> a number of Fneeb [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] were present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] within [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] noticed the Fneebs among the other patrons while he drank [[Elshandruu Pica Thundercloud|Pica Thundercloud]] with fellow hunters [[Dyyz Nataz]] and [[Spurch Goa]].<ref name="Hunter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Fneeb were created by [[Tom Veitch|Tom]] and [[Martha Veitch]] for the short story "[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]," published in [[1995]] as part of the anthology ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]''.<ref name="Hunter" />
